/usr/bin/ar qc libWWLib.a CMakeFiles/WWLib.dir/Except.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWLib.dir/FastAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWLib.dir/LaunchWeb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWLib.dir/WWCOMUtil.cpp.o
